\tzpentry{ID3588}{Induced Vector Potential Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3588 introduces Induced Vector Potential Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \vec{A}_{\text{induced}}(\vec{r}, t) = -\frac{1}{4\pi c^2} \int_V \frac{\partial \vec{J}/\partial t}{|\vec{r} - \vec{r}'|} d^3r' \end{equation}
